name: pb
description: Product Builder v1.5.1 — registry-backed prototype builder with a unified 5-tab UI, a cheap build loop, a small memory layer, a design-system-agnostic core, a two-mode hand-off, an agent-powered testing sandbox, and a multi-agent orchestrator.
